nonGoals: Do not change KNOWN_TAGS case sensitivity in validate.ts
Do not modify isTagSupportedByProvider() directly (it benefits automatically)
Do not alter SSML_TAGS array entries
Do not touch any other lookup function
objective: Normalize tag name comparison in getTagDef() to be case-insensitive by lowercasing both the lookup key and the definition's tag property
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.ts, change the getTagDef() comparison from `t.tag === tagName` to `t.tag.toLowerCase() === tagName.toLowerCase()`. This is a single-line change on approximately line 163. Existing tests must continue to pass — all 16 current tests exercise lowercase lookups and will confirm no regression. isTagSupportedByProvider() delegates to getTagDef() so it inherits the fix for free.

nonGoals: Do not add tests for validate.ts behavior
Do not modify existing describe blocks
Do not add provider-specific integration tests beyond the isTagSupportedByProvider casing parity check
objective: Add a describe block in tags.test.ts covering uppercase, mixed-case, and lowercase lookups plus a nonexistent-tag guard
planText: In apps/web/src/lib/ssml/tags.test.ts, add a new `describe('case-insensitive lookup')` block with these test cases: (1) getTagDef('PROSODY') returns the prosody definition, (2) getTagDef('Break') returns the break definition, (3) getTagDef('emphasis') returns the emphasis definition (existing lowercase behavior preserved), (4) getTagDef('eMpHaSiS') returns the emphasis definition (mixed-case), (5) getTagDef('nonexistent') returns undefined (no false positives), (6) isTagSupportedByProvider('PROSODY', 'aws-polly') equals isTagSupportedByProvider('prosody', 'aws-polly'). Use vitest's expect().toEqual() and expect().toBeUndefined() assertions consistent with the existing test style.
